'''Ganlihk''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dantus sector/Legends|Dantus sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
Ganlihk was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-inhabited [[Forest/Legends|forest]] planet with lakes and rivers. It was in the [[Ganlihk system/Legends|Ganlihk system]]. It was the [[ludos]], [[Ryless tree|ryless]], and [[zuxu]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. [[Hendrixen]] once led his friends on a fishing trip to Ganlihk.
